title: Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Mobquetchampions.jpg|thumb|250px|The 22 BBY winners]]
'''Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings''' was a race in [[Pyre Folas]], [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]]. It was sponsored by landspeeder manufacturer [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the victors included:

*[[Jomo]]
*[[Shimer Londalin]]
*[[Mogoyu]]
*[[Pumav]]
*[[Yeep]]
*[[Yopaxtul]]

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|sports/13418_1.html|New Galaxy's Fastest Hexaped}}
